TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Cinamalay, title = Cinamalay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cinamalay} }

S.FORM: == Cinamalay a paliding == I 'ayaw no tosaso'ot a miheca'an,malaheciay to ni Setiwonseng hananay a tamdawmisanga ko cinamalay a paliding , pakayn i faedet no nanom a masadak ko dahor ko sakaci'icel a dademak ko kikay,ta cumikay ko cinamalay a paliding ,nikaolila,miromromay to namal,satano'acefelsanay ko paliding. o niyaro' ni Setiwonseng i inko hananay a kitakit. Tangasa a nini,adihay ko citangalay a tamdaw,liyawliyawhan a misanga',macakat to kofacu ato 'icel no cikay no cinamalay a paliding .caayto ka ciacefel ko sakaciicel no sakacumikay no cinamalay a paliding.ono tingki to a'icel ko sakadademak no kikay no cinamalay a paliding a cumikay. Yoira to ko cinamalay a paliding i.pakayni a makelid ko polong no kitakit a mihawang to nanolaka:tsanay a 'orip, a masafaeloh ko, sakalomakat no tamdaw,mikalicto to paliding ko amilaod to kahicelaan a pala ato niya ro',hatila'ay ko nikacaloway no 'orip,tahanini. Iti:yaho awa ko paliding i,laka:tsa ko tamdaw a taylaiomah a mawmah ato taylailoma a niyaro'a palafang. anoira ko cacuro'en a dafong i 'olonghananay,latek i pa'olongen ko kolong lomasato,papikidkid ko kolong.caaykadepoc a milaod to omah a mawmah ato palafang i malaayay a niyaro'. Hatinihantoi,ira to ko(cinamalay a paliding),capahoda a tangasa i katahiraan,ano nanikalingko a mikalic to (cinamalay a paliding)i,tosa ko tatokian i tahirato i taypak,hatomangata'ayto, nikaolila,anolakaten i latekmasafolad ko romi'ad. Toloay ko kakiloma no cikay no(cinamalay a paliding),o sahacikay i o cecinghaw hananay,ano macaloh ko lakat i onini ko kakalicen.isafaay a cikay i o cikanghaw hananay,o macedengay a cikay i o cicince hananay. O (cinamalay a paliding) i,o miculo'ay to tamdaw ato dafng,adihay ko kasahako a makakitikiting,lateksepat,enen,moetep,safawtosa ko kaadihay no kasakitikiting no hako no(cinamalay a paliding).ano ira:'ay a mikecul to karomakat no (cinamalay a paliding)i,mareko o cumikay a masalaylayyay a roma', mangalef a masadak nanikemod no lotok ko cinamalay a paliding,mareko o lalikah.kahemeka a nengnengen.
S.PHON: == ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč == i °ajaw no~u to~usaso~u °o~ut a mińß…ô ¶a °an,ma…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj to~u ni s…ôtiwo~uns…ôŇč ńßananaj a tam…¨~…ģawmisaŇča ko~u ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč , pakajn i fa…ô…¨~…ģ…ôt no~u nano~um a masa…¨~…ģak ko~u …¨~…ģańßo~ur ko~u saka ¶i °i ¶…ô…ĺ a …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ômak ko~u kikaj,ta ¶o~u~umikaj ko~u ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč ,nikao~u…ĺi…ĺa,miro~umro~umaj to~u nama…ĺ,satano~u °a ¶…ôf…ô…ĺsanaj ko~u pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč. o~u nijaro~u ° ni s…ôtiwo~uns…ôŇč i inko~u ńßananaj a kitakit. taŇčasa a nini,a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u ¶itaŇča…ĺaj a tam…¨~…ģaw,…ĺijaw…ĺijawńßan a misaŇča °,ma ¶akat to~u ko~ufa ¶o~u~u ato~u °i ¶…ô…ĺ no~u ¶ikaj no~u ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč . ¶aajto~u ka ¶ia ¶…ôf…ô…ĺ ko~u saka ¶ii ¶…ô…ĺ no~u saka ¶o~u~umikaj no~u ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč.o~uno~u tiŇčki to~u a °i ¶…ô…ĺ ko~u saka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ômak no~u kikaj no~u ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč a ¶o~u~umikaj. jo~uira to~u ko~u ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč i.pakajni a mak…ô…ĺi…¨~…ģ ko~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u kitakit a mińßawaŇč to~u nano~u…ĺaka:tsanaj a °o~urip, a masafa…ô…ĺo~uńß ko~u, saka…ĺo~umakat no~u tam…¨~…ģaw,mika…ĺi ¶to~u to~u pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč ko~u ami…ĺao~u…¨~…ģ to~u kańßi ¶…ô…ĺaan a pa…ĺa ato~u nija ro~u °,ńßati…ĺa °aj ko~u nika ¶a…ĺo~uwaj no~u °o~urip,tańßanini. iti:jańßo~u awa ko~u pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč i,…ĺaka:tsa ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw a taj…ĺaio~umańß a mawmańß ato~u taj…ĺai…ĺo~uma a nijaro~u °a pa…ĺafaŇč. ano~uira ko~u ¶a ¶o~u~uro~u °…ôn a …¨~…ģafo~uŇč i °o~u…ĺo~uŇčńßananaj,…ĺat…ôk i pa °o~u…ĺo~uŇč…ôn ko~u ko~u…ĺo~uŇč …ĺo~umasato~u,papiki…¨~…ģki…¨~…ģ ko~u ko~u…ĺo~uŇč. ¶aajka…¨~…ģ…ôpo~u ¶ a mi…ĺao~u…¨~…ģ to~u o~umańß a mawmańß ato~u pa…ĺafaŇč i ma…ĺaajaj a nijaro~u °. ńßatinińßanto~ui,ira to~u ko~u( ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč), ¶apańßo~u…¨~…ģa a taŇčasa i katańßiraan,ano~u nanika…ĺiŇčko~u a mika…ĺi ¶ to~u ( ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč)i,to~usa ko~u tato~ukian i tańßirato~u i tajpak,ńßato~umaŇčata °ajto~u, nikao~u…ĺi…ĺa,ano~u…ĺakat…ôn i …ĺat…ôkmasafo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ko~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. to~u…ĺo~uaj ko~u kaki…ĺo~uma no~u ¶ikaj no~u( ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč),o~u sańßa ¶ikaj i o~u ¶…ô ¶iŇčńßaw ńßananaj,ano~u ma ¶a…ĺo~uńß ko~u …ĺakat i o~unini ko~u kaka…ĺi ¶…ôn.isafaaj a ¶ikaj i o~u ¶ikaŇčńßaw ńßananaj,o~u ma ¶…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇčaj a ¶ikaj i o~u ¶i ¶in ¶…ô ńßananaj. o~u ( ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč) i,o~u mi ¶o~u~u…ĺo~u °aj to~u tam…¨~…ģaw ato~u …¨~…ģafŇč,a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u kasańßako~u a makakitikitiŇč,…ĺat…ôks…ôpat,…ôn…ôn,mo~u…ôt…ôp,safawto~usa ko~u kaa…¨~…ģińßaj no~u kasakitikitiŇč no~u ńßako~u no~u( ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč).ano~u ira: °aj a mik…ô ¶o~u~u…ĺ to~u karo~umakat no~u ( ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč)i,mar…ôko~u o~u ¶o~u~umikaj a masa…ĺaj…ĺajjaj a ro~uma °, maŇča…ĺ…ôf a masa…¨~…ģak nanik…ômo~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uto~uk ko~u ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč,mar…ôko~u o~u …ĺa…ĺikańß.kańß…ôm…ôka a n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn.
S.FORM: == Cinamalay a paliding == I 'ayaw no tosaso'ot a miheca'an,malaheciay to ni Setiwonseng hananay a tamdawmisanga ko cinamalay a paliding , pakayn i faedet no nanom a masadak ko dahor ko sakaci'icel a dademak ko kikay,ta cumikay ko cinamalay a paliding ,nikaolila,miromromay to namal,satano'acefelsanay ko paliding. o niyaro' ni Setiwonseng i inko hananay a kitakit. Tangasa a nini,adihay ko citangalay a tamdaw,liyawliyawhan a misanga',macakat to kofacu ato 'icel no cikay no cinamalay a paliding .caayto ka ciacefel ko sakaciicel no sakacumikay no cinamalay a paliding.ono tingki to a'icel ko sakadademak no kikay no cinamalay a paliding a cumikay. Yoira to ko cinamalay a paliding i.pakayni a makelid ko polong no kitakit a mihawang to nanolaka:tsanay a 'orip, a masafaeloh ko, sakalomakat no tamdaw,mikalicto to paliding ko amilaod to kahicelaan a pala ato niya ro',hatila'ay ko nikacaloway no 'orip,tahanini. Iti:yaho awa ko paliding i,laka:tsa ko tamdaw a taylaiomah a mawmah ato taylailoma a niyaro'a palafang. anoira ko cacuro'en a dafong i 'olonghananay,latek i pa'olongen ko kolong lomasato,papikidkid ko kolong.caaykadepoc a milaod to omah a mawmah ato palafang i malaayay a niyaro'. Hatinihantoi,ira to ko(cinamalay a paliding),capahoda a tangasa i katahiraan,ano nanikalingko a mikalic to (cinamalay a paliding)i,tosa ko tatokian i tahirato i taypak,hatomangata'ayto, nikaolila,anolakaten i latekmasafolad ko romi'ad. Toloay ko kakiloma no cikay no(cinamalay a paliding),o sahacikay i o cecinghaw hananay,ano macaloh ko lakat i onini ko kakalicen.isafaay a cikay i o cikanghaw hananay,o macedengay a cikay i o cicince hananay. O (cinamalay a paliding) i,o miculo'ay to tamdaw ato dafng,adihay ko kasahako a makakitikiting,lateksepat,enen,moetep,safawtosa ko kaadihay no kasakitikiting no hako no(cinamalay a paliding).ano ira:'ay a mikecul to karomakat no (cinamalay a paliding)i,mareko o cumikay a masalaylayyay a roma', mangalef a masadak nanikemod no lotok ko cinamalay a paliding,mareko o lalikah.kahemeka a nengnengen.

nija ro~u °,ńßati…ĺa °aj ko~u nika ¶a…ĺo~uwaj no~u °o~urip,tańßanini. iti:jańßo~u awa ko~u pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč i,…ĺaka:tsa ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw a taj…ĺaio~umańß a mawmańß ato~u taj…ĺai…ĺo~uma a nijaro~u °a pa…ĺafaŇč. ano~uira ko~u ¶a ¶o~u~uro~u °…ôn a …¨~…ģafo~uŇč i °o~u…ĺo~uŇčńßananaj,…ĺat…ôk i pa °o~u…ĺo~uŇč…ôn ko~u ko~u…ĺo~uŇč …ĺo~umasato~u,papiki…¨~…ģki…¨~…ģ ko~u ko~u…ĺo~uŇč. ¶aajka…¨~…ģ…ôpo~u ¶ a mi…ĺao~u…¨~…ģ to~u o~umańß a mawmańß ato~u pa…ĺafaŇč i ma…ĺaajaj a nijaro~u °. ńßatinińßanto~ui,ira to~u ko~u( ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč), ¶apańßo~u…¨~…ģa a taŇčasa i katańßiraan,ano~u nanika…ĺiŇčko~u a mika…ĺi ¶ to~u ( ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč)i,to~usa ko~u tato~ukian i tańßirato~u i tajpak,ńßato~umaŇčata °ajto~u, nikao~u…ĺi…ĺa,ano~u…ĺakat…ôn i …ĺat…ôkmasafo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ko~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. to~u…ĺo~uaj ko~u kaki…ĺo~uma no~u ¶ikaj no~u( ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč),o~u sańßa ¶ikaj i o~u ¶…ô ¶iŇčńßaw ńßananaj,ano~u ma ¶a…ĺo~uńß ko~u …ĺakat i o~unini ko~u kaka…ĺi ¶…ôn.isafaaj a ¶ikaj i o~u ¶ikaŇčńßaw ńßananaj,o~u ma ¶…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇčaj a ¶ikaj i o~u ¶i ¶in ¶…ô ńßananaj. o~u ( ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč) i,o~u mi ¶o~u~u…ĺo~u °aj to~u tam…¨~…ģaw ato~u …¨~…ģafŇč,a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u kasańßako~u a makakitikitiŇč,…ĺat…ôks…ôpat,…ôn…ôn,mo~u…ôt…ôp,safawto~usa ko~u kaa…¨~…ģińßaj no~u kasakitikitiŇč no~u ńßako~u no~u( ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč).ano~u ira: °aj a mik…ô ¶o~u~u…ĺ to~u karo~umakat no~u ( ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč)i,mar…ôko~u o~u ¶o~u~umikaj a masa…ĺaj…ĺajjaj a ro~uma °, maŇča…ĺ…ôf a masa…¨~…ģak nanik…ômo~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uto~uk ko~u ¶inama…ĺaj a pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč,mar…ôko~u o~u …ĺa…ĺikańß.kańß…ôm…ôka a n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn.
